name: ST2110 In TOP
description: Support for [[Blackmagic_Design|Blackmagic IP range]], [https://www.aja.com/products/kona-ip25 AJA IP25] and Deltacast DELTA-ip-ST2110 devices. See also [[ST2110 Out TOP]], [[ST2110 Device CHOP]].

parameters.name: Active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Controls if this input has it's connection open and is capturing data.

parameters.name: ST2110 Device CHOP
parameters.label: ST2110 Device CHOP
parameters.description: Since a NIC has one set of settings such as DHCP/IP settings, that is controlled for each device using the [[ST2110 Device CHOP]]. This node will use that device to discover available input channels, and use the settings configured in that node for it's operation.

parameters.name: Device
parameters.label: Device
parameters.description: Will be populated when the [[ST2110 Device CHOP]] is active and configured properly. Select which input channel on the device to use.

parameters.name: Setup Mode
parameters.label: Setup Mode
parameters.description: Controls how this node configures it's input streams.

parameters.name: Video SDP
parameters.label: Video SDP
parameters.description: The SDP string for the video essence.

parameters.name: Audio SDP
parameters.label: Audio SDP
parameters.description: The SDP string for the audio essence.

parameters.name: Ancillary SDP
parameters.label: Ancillary SDP
parameters.description: The SDP string for the ancillary essence.

parameters.name: Set Source IP from SDP
parameters.label: Set Source IP from SDP
parameters.description: On devices that support it, this causes the Source IP to also be assigned to the device's configuration, based on what is in the SDP.

parameters.name: Main Stream Identifier
parameters.label: Main Stream Identifier
parameters.description: Default's to 'primary' when blank, controls the name of identifier to select the section of the SDP to use, for the main stream.

parameters.name: SPS Stream Identifier
parameters.label: SPS Stream Identifier
parameters.description: Default's to 'secondary' when blank, controls the name of identifier to select the section of the SDP to use, for the SPS stream.

parameters.name: Deinterlace
parameters.label: Deinterlace
parameters.description: Controls how the content is deinterlaced, if desired.

parameters.name: Field Precedence
parameters.label: Field Precedence
parameters.description: When using 'Bob (Split)' deinterlacing, controls which field is used as the first frame of the two fields.

parameters.name: Input Pixel Format
parameters.label: Input Pixel Format
parameters.description: Controls the bit depth to convert the input signal into when uploading the data to the GPU.

parameters.name: Transfer Mode
parameters.label: Transfer Mode
parameters.description: Controls the strategy used to upload images to the GPU.

parameters.name: Reset Stats
parameters.label: Reset Stats
parameters.description: Reset the stats given from the [[Info CHOP]].

_provenance.fact: scraped from the live ST2110_In_TOP wiki page
